translations.ja: あなたを信頼しています。

tokens.explanation: Fusion of the clitic subject pronoun 'je' with the present indicative 1sg of 'avoir'; here 'avoir' functions as a lexical verb in the idiom 'avoir confiance en' (to trust).
Common feminine noun serving as the direct object of 'avoir' in the fixed expression 'avoir confiance'; used without an article.
Preposition that is part of the construction 'avoir confiance en'; introduces the complement specifying the entity trusted.
Stressed second-person singular pronoun used after a preposition ('en'); refers to the addressee.

translations.de: Manchmal fehlt es uns an Selbstvertrauen.
translations.it: A volte ci manca fiducia in noi stessi.
translations.vi: Đôi khi chúng ta thiếu tự tin.
translations.nl: Soms ontbreekt het ons aan zelfvertrouwen.
translations.hi: कभी-कभी हमें आत्मविश्वास की कमी होती है.
translations.el: Μερικές φορές μας λείπει η αυτοπεποίθηση.
translations.ja: 時々私たちは自信が足りません。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (3rd person singular); often used colloquially to mean 'we'.
Main verb in present indicative 3sg; governs the construction 'manquer de + NOUN' meaning 'to lack'.
Preposition introducing the complement of 'manquer' ('manquer de confiance').
Feminine noun serving as the complement of the preposition 'de'; no article is used in this construction.
Adverb of frequency modifying the whole clause; placed sentence-finally here.

sentences.target: Je retrouve ma confiance au travail.

translations.fr: Je retrouve ma confiance au travail.
translations.en: I’m regaining my confidence at work.
translations.es: Estoy recuperando mi confianza en el trabajo.
translations.de: Ich gewinne bei der Arbeit mein Selbstvertrauen zurück.
translations.it: Al lavoro sto ritrovando fiducia in me.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在工作中重新找回了自信。
translations.ru: На работе я возвращаю себе уверенность.
translations.pt: Estou recuperando minha confiança no trabalho.
translations.he: אני מחזיר לעצמי את הביטחון בעבודה.
translations.vi: Tôi đang lấy lại sự tự tin khi làm việc.
translations.nl: Op het werk krijg ik mijn zelfvertrouwen terug.
translations.uk: Я відновлюю свою впевненість на роботі.
translations.hi: मैं काम पर अपना आत्मविश्वास वापस पा रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Στη δουλειά ξαναβρίσκω την αυτοπεποίθησή μου.
translations.nb: Jeg får tilbake selvtilliten min på jobben.
translations.id: Saya sedang mendapatkan kembali kepercayaan diri di tempat kerja.
translations.sv: Jag återfår mitt självförtroende på jobbet.
translations.da: Jeg genvinder min selvtillid på arbejdet.
translations.ja: 職場で自信を取り戻しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb in present indicative 1sg; means 'to find again/regain'; takes a direct object.
Possessive determiner, feminine singular; agrees with 'confiance' and marks ownership by the speaker.
Feminine noun functioning as the direct object of 'retrouve'.
Contraction of the preposition 'à' and the definite article 'le'; introduces a locative complement.
Common masculine noun; head of the prepositional phrase 'au travail' functioning as a locative adverbial.

sentences.target: Vous me redonnez confiance avec vos conseils.
sentences.reading: /vu mə ʁədɔne kɔ̃fjɑ̃s avɛk vo kɔ̃sɛj/

translations.fr: Vous me redonnez confiance avec vos conseils.
translations.ipa: /vu mə ʁədɔne kɔ̃fjɑ̃s avɛk vo kɔ̃sɛj/
translations.en: You’re giving me confidence again with your advice.
translations.es: Sus consejos me devuelven la confianza.
translations.de: Ihre Ratschläge geben mir wieder Selbstvertrauen.
translations.it: I vostri consigli mi ridanno fiducia.
translations.ko: 당신의 조언 덕분에 저는 다시 자신감을 얻고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 您的建议让我重新有了信心。
translations.yue: 你嘅建議令我重拾信心。
translations.pt: Seus conselhos me devolvem a confiança.
translations.he: העצות שלכם מחזירות לי את הביטחון.
translations.tr: Sizin tavsiyeleriniz bana yeniden güven veriyor.
translations.vi: Lời khuyên của bạn đang giúp tôi lấy lại tự tin.
translations.nl: Uw adviezen geven me weer vertrouwen.
translations.uk: Ваші поради знову повертають мені впевненість.
translations.hu: A tanácsaitok újra önbizalmat adnak nekem.
translations.hi: आपकी सलाह मुझे फिर से आत्मविश्वास दे रही है.
translations.pl: Wasze rady przywracają mi pewność siebie.
translations.el: Οι συμβουλές σας μου δίνουν ξανά αυτοπεποίθηση.
translations.nb: Rådene deres gir meg selvtillit igen.
translations.id: Saran Anda membuat saya kembali percaya diri.
translations.sv: Era råd ger mig självförtroende igen.
translations.cs: Vaše rady mi znovu vrací sebevědomí.
translations.da: Jeres råd giver mig selvtillid igen.
translations.ja: あなたの助言でまた自信を取り戻しています。

tokens.explanation: Second-person pronoun used as subject; can be plural or formal singular.
Clitic pronoun, 1st person singular; indirect object (recipient) of 'redonner'.
Main verb in present indicative 2pl; agrees with 'vous'; means 'to give back/restore'.
Feminine noun serving as the direct object of 'redonnez'.
Preposition introducing a means/instrumental complement.
Possessive determiner, plural; agrees with 'conseils' and indicates possession by the addressee(s).
Common plural noun; object of the preposition 'avec'.

You’re giving me confidence again with your advice.
